chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Tansfer Appln.No.S-46 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.3128/2021 (E/A). 03. For orders on M.A.No.3129/2021 (S/A). 04. For hearing of main case. 01.11.2021 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. None for the private respondents. = * = * = * = * = * = The applicant by making certain allegations has sought for transfer of his criminal revision application from file of learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Qamber, which are denied by him in his comments. By making such denial, he however, has recorded no objection to transfer of the criminal revision application of the applicant from his file. In order to give an end to controversy, the subject criminal revision application is transferred to the file of learned Sessions Judge, Qamber-Shahdadkot @ Qamber, with direction that either the same to be disposed of by him or to be assigned by him to any other Judge of competent jurisdiction of his district for its disposal in accordance with law. The instant Crl.Transfer application is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed applications. J U D G E
